content.en:
Three hundred years is not a long time, but for Ye Tian, there is a big problem, that is, his growth rate is too fast, his foundation is too shallow, and it stands to reason that the quota for this session has nothing to do with him.

There is a competition once in a thousand years, and the quota for each time has already been set, if Ye Tian competes for the next quota, then there is still hope, but if he competes for the quota this time, it will be troublesome.

Of course, it didn't mean that Ye Tian didn't have a chance to compete, he only needed to get the joint recommendation of more than ten Holy Ancestors, and then challenge the guard team level that originally set the quota, and if the challenge was successful, he could get the quota.

But in this way, it will undoubtedly offend the guard-level powerhouse, and even offend the forces behind the other party.

Under normal circumstances, there would not be a few Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses who would be willing to jointly recommend him.

But after Ye Tian learned about this, he visited a Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse one by one, and even promised all kinds of benefits, and finally moved ten Saint Ancestor-level people to jointly recommend him.

Bayin City, a mansion.

Guardian level powerhouse Nuo Yu was very angry, originally he had already set the quota for this year's Life Divine Mountain, although his talent was top-notch, he also wanted to perfectly evolve to the Holy Ancestor level, as long as the Saint Ancestor level after perfect evolution could he hope to be promoted to the Great Saint Ancestor level and the Old Ancestor level.

But he didn't have much confidence in perfect evolution, if he relied on himself, even if he had less than three percent of the hope of being promoted to the Holy Ancestor, let alone perfect evolution.

Therefore, he needed a strong inheritance to assist him in advancing to the Holy Ancestor level, and the strongest inheritance of the Life Green Clan was in the Life Divine Mountain.

The Life Divine Mountain is a forbidden place, and under normal circumstances, he can't enter it at all, and only a once-in-a-thousand quota can let him enter.

Before, Bayin City crushed him one by one, and finally he waited for these geniuses to get the quota one by one, and this time it was finally his turn, but he never expected that someone would come out of nowhere to compete with him.

"No, there are already ten Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses who have jointly recommended that guy named Ye, it will take a few days to review, once he challenges me in a few days, I'm afraid I'm not an opponent!"

Nuoyu worried.

He has enough knowledge of his own strength, although he is a top escort team-level, but Ye Tian's strength is too strong, known as the escort team-level invincible, this is not the strength that is blown, but the real combat power.

If he fought against Ye Tian, he estimated that he would lose a few moves.

"Is it possible to wait another thousand years?"

Nuoyu said tangledly.

A thousand years is nothing, he can retreat a little, but the quota is gone, what he lost is not 1,000 years, and he still has face!

This quota was originally his, and if it was snatched away by others, then he would lose face.

When the time comes, I don't know how many people will mock him!

What made Nuo Yu breathe a sigh of relief was that Ye Tian's background was not deep, he was just highly talented, and he didn't have any backstage.

"Kill him!"

Nuo Yu had this thought in his heart, a dead genius, and he had no backer, no one would come to trouble him.

The key question is whether Ye Tian can be killed.

"You can't invite the Holy Ancestor level!"

Nuo Yu knew very well that the Saint Ancestor level could not make a move against the escort team level, otherwise the Life Green Clan would definitely punish him severely, and no Saint Ancestor level would dare to make a move, unless he would die.

Therefore, he could only ask the escort team level to make a move, but Ye Tian was invincible at the escort team level, and if he was alone, he was not Ye Tian's opponent at all.

Any race has a dark side, as powerful as the Green Race of Life, which has evolved over the years, and naturally there are some strong people who are on the dark side.

For example, there is an organization in the Life Green Clan, called the Black God Organization!

This organization specializes in taking on some assassination missions, even if it is a Holy Ancestor, as long as they are willing to pay the price, they dare to assassinate.

Nuo Yu happened to know the contact information of a branch of the Black God Organization, so he secretly contacted this organization, paid an astonishing deposit, and gave the task of assassinating Ye Tian.

......

Two days later.

Ye Tian received a message from a village asking for help, and this village happened to be the village where Ye Tian lived before.

If Ye Tian didn't support, I am afraid that someone would use this matter to accuse him during this period.

So, Ye Tian left Bayin City and rushed to that village.

At his speed, it won't be long before he reaches the village.

But not long after he left Bayin City, he shuttled through the space one after another, and used one treasure after another to block the void to block this area.

A convoy level!

Two Escort Rank!

Three Guards!"

......

More than twenty Guardian-level officers appeared, each wearing masks and cloaks to shield detection.

Judging from the aura, these twenty escort ranks are all the top escort level, and all of them have powerful weapons.

Judging by its temperament, it is also a long-term combatant, not that kind of vase, so its combat effectiveness is good.

For a combat team of this size, as long as the Saint Ancestor level does not make a move, any escort team level may not be able to survive.

"Who are you?"

Ye Tian asked.

These twenty people did not speak, but came up and started directly.

The battle is on!

As soon as the battle began, they suppressed Ye Tian.

There is no way, although Ye Tian claims to be invincible at the escort team level, these people seem to be the escort team specially selected to deal with him, and they cooperate with each other very tacitly, even more powerful than a hundred scattered top escort team levels.

"It's a pity that I can only use the power of the Life Green Clan, if I can use the strength of the body, I can easily kill them in seconds!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But this is just thinking about it, he doesn't dare to lift the reincarnation of nature, otherwise once he is exposed, he won't want to enter the Divine Mountain of Life.

Ye Tian did not aim to kill the other party, he only insisted on saving his life, but secretly sent a message to a Saint Ancestor in Bayin City, who was very optimistic about him, so he would definitely come to the rescue.

Time passed little by little, and although Ye Tian was injured, he never collapsed and persevered.

The twenty people of the Black God Organization began to be anxious, originally according to their plan, once they besieged Ye Tian, they would definitely be able to kill Ye Tian in a short time, but they never expected Ye Tian to be so strong and tenacious, and they resisted the attack of the twenty of them.

"Withdraw!"

The escort team level of the Black God Organization felt the aura of the Holy Ancestor coming from the direction of Bayin City, and another Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse came.

If they don't run away, I'm afraid they'll die here.

Just as the people of the Black God Organization had fled, a Saint Ancestor descended.

"Ye, are you alright?"

Bayin City's Holy Ancestor-level powerhouse Forget Yu asked.

"Lord Forget, I'm fine!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"I'll definitely give you an explanation for this matter!" said in a deep voice.

"Thank you, Lord Forget!"

Ye Tian pretended to be grateful.

Bayin City moved quickly, and it didn't take long to confirm that the group of people was from the Black God Organization.

Then there were Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses who began to track down the people of the Black God Organization, after all, they made a move, there will definitely be traces left, and if you really have to work hard to track these traces, there is still hope to track them.

But at this time, a guard in Bayin City accidentally revealed that he had asked someone from the Black God Organization to assassinate Ye Tian.

On the same day, the Guard-level died.

But everyone knows that the escort level was pushed out to take the blame, but even if he knew, there was no way to continue to investigate, otherwise the matter would be a big problem.

Although Ye Tian didn't know who was targeting him, he also had a few targets, but he didn't care.

After all, he is not a member of the Life Green Clan, and he will not stay in the Life Green Clan for too long, so he does not care much about these disputes.

Another two days passed, and Ye Tian's challenge application was passed.

And Nuo Yu knew Ye Tian's combat power, and he was so frightened that he didn't dare to agree, for fear that Ye Tian would deliberately kill him during the battle, so Nuo Yu took the initiative to admit defeat.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained the quota to enter the Life Divine Mountain.

His most important step was accomplished!
